---
title: "Intervention types: static, dynamic, MTP, and IPSI"
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Intervention types}
  %\VignetteEngine{quarto::html}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r}
#| include: false
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
```

<!-- TODO: write interventions vignette -->
<!-- Cover: static(), shift(), scale(), threshold(), dynamic(), ipsi() -->
<!-- Examples: continuous treatment (smokeintensity), dose-response curves -->
